title: PersonalProfileRecord
description: A single personal-context record about the user: identity, voice, goals, or another category from data/myself/. Carries the same sensitivity vocabulary as MemoryRecord so one visibility floor governs both. Reference templates are synthetic; this schema describes the shape, never a real person's data.

category.description: Which personal-context area this record belongs to. Each category declares a default sensitivity in data/myself/personal-data-catalog.md.

summary.description: Navigation text. Indexed for summary-first retrieval; must stand on its own and never restate a restricted body.

body.description: Full personal content. NOT indexed; redacted on read unless explicitly revealed, per the sensitivity label.

sensitivity.description: Drives the visibility floor. Personal contact, finances, health, and relationships default to 'restricted'.

content_sha256.description: Derived content hash for drift/tamper checks. Computed on write; not authored by hand.
